---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of what the problem is. Ex. *"I'm always frustrated when I can't ..."*

**Describe the solution you'd like**
How should this feature work? Describe the use case.

**Alternatives you've considered**
Any other approaches you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, examples from other projects, links — anything that helps.
